productName: Rocket Loan : Variable Home Loan with Offset (Owner Occupied)

detail.name: Rocket Loan : Variable Home Loan with Offset (Owner Occupied)
detail.description: You could save on home loan interest with up to 10 offset accounts, unlimited extra repayments and our package option.

features.additionalInfo: Repay or redraw: Make unlimited extra payments to pay off your loan sooner. Or redraw your funds if you need to.
Offset and save : Every dollar in up to 10 linked offset accounts reduces the interest on your home loan.
Discounted rates: Your lender can tailor a sweet rate, based on your needs. Repay weekly, fortnightly or monthly.

features.additionalValue: Handy loan options: Package and save for a $395 annual package fee and/or split your loan for added flexibility.. Eligibility criteria, T&Cs apply.

features.additionalInfo: Split your loan balance into separate fixed rate and variable rate accounts for the best of both worlds.
Cancellation of the package : A package owner may cancel the package at any time by giving us 14 days advance notice in writing.

Comparison rate: The comparison rate is based on a loan of $150,000 over the term of 25 years. WARNING: This comparison rate is true only for the examples given and may not include all fees and charges. Different terms, fees or other loan amounts might result in a different comparison rate.
Loan Payment Method - Direct Debit (preferred), Direct Credit, Branch Payment, Internet or Phone Banking
Repayment frequencies includes weekly, fortnightly or monthly

Substituting a security : You may ask us to accept a new mortgage over other land as a substitute for any mortgage which is security for your loan. We may agree to this if you satisfy any reasonable requirements that we have, such as repaying part of the loan amount. We will require the new mortgage to be provided at the same time that the existing mortgage is discharged. We charge a fee for substituting a mortgage or other security.
Statements of account : We will send you a statement of your loan account at least every six months or more frequently if you request
The product provides switching (from another product) feature
This loan can be part of a combination loan

The product provides options which includes BPAY, reduced repayments (incl. parental leave), progressive drawdown, repayment holiday, portability, smartPay, loan increase (top up), parental guarantee, card access, premier advantage package and lenders mortgage insurance
The product includes extra repayment features.
The product includes fraud protection features.
Subject to terms and conditions, this product includes guarantor features.
Relationship management is available for eligible customers.

constraints.additionalInfo: Loan Maximum - interest only period 5 years

eligibility.additionalValue: Those with an Australian permanent residency and who are currently in Australia

discounts.description: This fee is waived for customers that have Premier Advantage Package (other fees apply)
This fee is waived for customers that have Premier Advantage Package (other fees apply)

fees.name: Annual Package Fee
fees.additionalInfo: For customer opting for Premier Advantage Package

fees.name: Lenders Mortgage Insurance Premium
fees.additionalInfo: If your deposit is less than 20% then Lenders Mortgage Insurance is usually required. There may be other circumstances where Lenders Mortgage Insurance is also required. As Lenders Mortgage Insurance reduces bank's risk as a lender when providing a home loan, you may be able to apply for a home loan and get into your home sooner, with a lower deposit. Lenders Mortgage Insurance insures bank for any shortfall in the event that you default on your loan and if the proceeds from the property sale are not enough to pay off the loan in full. The cost of Lenders Mortgage Insurance is calculated as a percentage of the loan amount. The percentage applied will vary depending on a number of factors. Please speak to your lender if you would like to understand this process in more detail. The cost of Lenders Mortgage Insurance premium is passed on to you. We do not receive a commission on Lenders Mortgage Insurance.

fees.name: Redraw
fees.additionalInfo: If activated and extra funds are available

fees.name: Repayment holidays or Reduced Repayments
fees.additionalInfo: Repayment holidays or Reduced Repayments of up to 50% for up to 12 months (subject to approval)

fees.name: Construction loan option
fees.additionalInfo: Construction loan option (property valuer fees may apply)

fees.name: Portability option
fees.additionalInfo: Portability option (keeping your loan but changing the property securing the loan)

fees.name: Loan switching
fees.additionalInfo: Loan switching (changing loan or repayment type)
